title: Multiple failed login attempts detected
recommendation: Check user account activity and block suspicious IP if needed.

title: Suspicious email attachment detected
recommendation: Quarantine email, inspect attachment, and alert affected user.

title: Malware signature detected on endpoint
recommendation: Isolate endpoint and run malware scan.

title: Unusual outbound traffic pattern
recommendation: Review network logs and verify destination.

title: Unauthorized admin privilege attempt
recommendation: Check access logs and disable suspicious account if required.
